Obj_arg2.Description: The alpha channel component. Ranges from 0 to 255 inclusive. Default is 255. This arg is ignored if Obj_arg7 is set.

Obj_arg7.Name: Stars Required to Disappear
Obj_arg7.Description: The amount of stars required for the fog to disappear entirely. The Alpha value will start at 127, and will decrease for each star collected.
